scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uac Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1503558667 2 IN IP4 10.175.59.10 s=- c=IN IP4 10.175.59.14 b=AS:64 t=0 0 m=audio 2224 RTP/AVP 18 96 a=sendrecv a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 3 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uac Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Min-SE: 1200 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1503558667 3 IN IP4 10.175.59.10 s=- c=IN IP4 10.175.59.14 b=AS:64 t=0 0 m=audio 2224 RTP/AVP 18 96 a=sendrecv a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 3 ACK [routes] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 4 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Session-Expires: 1201;refresher=uac Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Min-SE: 1201 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1503558667 3 IN IP4 10.175.59.10 s=- c=IN IP4 10.175.59.14 b=AS:64 t=0 0 m=audio 2224 RTP/AVP 18 96 a=sendrecv a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:96 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 4 ACK [routes] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
